About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a government organization responsible for conducting various recruitment exams in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

For more information, visit the official website of UPSSSC.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC One Time Registration OTR Online Form 2026 is an initiative to simplify the recruitment process for candidates.

The programme aims to provide relief from filling initial information repeatedly for future recruitments.
